title: Real Python Learner Stories
content: Why I Chose Real Python(1:23) Overcoming Challenges With Real Python(1:12) Biggest Wins & Results With Real Python(1:31) Build the skills you need for a successful Python career: Douglas Ortego, Software Engineer“I came up to speed incredibly fast” Paul Paradis, Help Desk IT Support“You can take the information and put it into practice instantly” Brian Patrick O’Sullivan, Airline Revenue Management“There’s so much information there and it’s delivered really effectively” Mandy Wong, API and Integration Specialist“The explanations are thorough and lucid and they work for anybody at any stage” Edward Wright, Senior Systems Developer“It is a fantastic resource and it’s structured very well” Nadir Abdulhaqq, Business Intelligence Analyst“It’s like a one-stop shop. They’ve done an excellent job” Build the skills you need for a successful Python career: Christopher Scogin, Cloud Cyber Defence Analyst“My biggest win so far is having the confidence in myself to tackle new projects that I would’ve set aside before” Andi Elliott, Full Stack Developer“I definitely recommend Real Python, whether you’re a beginner or you’ve got some programming experience like me” Leona Rodenkirchen, Theoretical Physics M.Sc. Student“Very well designed, so that you can choose how to approach things yourself” Hugh Tipping, Senior Infrastructure Engineer“I’m always in there, no matter how much I think I know” David Dahan, Automation QA Specialist“The materials are more digestible and this saves you a whole lot of time and frustration” Milo Douglas Berg, Business Analysis Professor“Real Python is an efficient way to learn” Build the skills you need for a successful Python career: David Kedrosky, Python Developer“Made me feel more comfortable in my own programming skill sets regarding Python” Jamison Morse, Managing Principal“A fully integrated learning system […] and a community for camaraderie” Alex Elder, Data Scientist“Made me more comfortable with productionalizing Python programs and branching out into areas that I was not comfortable in before” Blaise Pabon, Sales Engineer“Search once and get a useful answer on the first go” John Tocher, Systems Designer“Using Real Python has made me able to more quickly get on top of a particular technology and introduce others” Glenn Lehman, Data Analyst“I would recommend Real Python to anyone who actually wants to learn Python” Build the skills you need for a successful Python career:
